All Good Things - Part 2: The final Star Trek: The Next Generation episode ever made. Picard is desperate to discover what is causing his time travelling and suspects that Q is connected.

Duet: A Kobeerian freighter transports a sick Cardassian visitor to DS9. Kira, however, suspects that he could actually be a notorious war criminal.
Shades Of Grey: O'Neill commits an indiscretion which jeopardises Earth's diplomatic relations with its allies. (S3, ep 18)
Nightingale: While searching for dilithium, the Delta Flyer, under Harry's command, comes to the aid of a ship under attack. (S7, ep 8)
Encounter at Farpoint - Part 1: The crew of the Enterprise are put on trial, for all the crimes of mankind, by a mysterious force called 'Q'.
A Gigantic Problem: An anomaly opens at an aircraft hanger and reporter Mick Harper turns up with a TV crew. To make matters worse, a giant Giganotosaurus arrives on the scene. (S3, ep 4)
Crossroads: After leading a tricky mission, Lt Winters is promoted. As Easy Co struggle in the cold, Winters is haunted by the innocents he has killed. Contains flashing images. (5 of 10)
Bastogne: Woefully undermanned and short on supplies, Easy Company dig foxholes around the Belgian town of Bastogne as they attempt to hold the line. Contains flashing images. (6 of 10)
The Son Also Rises: After Nick rushes to help Eve, Hank and Wu are left to investigate an attack on a group of scientists. (S6, ep 8)
